case_title: JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC VS. LEO G TANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANG, LEO G $9,401.37 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,704.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, LEO G DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-29-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039012) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100039012) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100039012) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100039012) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $302.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100039012) AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, LEO G
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-15-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
